title: OCI Vault Secret Deleted
description: Detects deletion of secrets from OCI Vault. Secret deletion can indicate an attacker covering tracks or disrupting application functionality.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ((('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.vault.schedulesecretdeletion' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.vault.deletesecret')))
falsepositives: Routine secret rotation with scheduled deletion
